body_txt: Some hats serve more of a purpose than just looking nice. Some even go beyond the mundane purpose of protecting the wearer's head. These Hats of Power grant superpowers , incredible luck , or other special abilities to whatever lucky chump happens to put them on. Sometimes, this serves as a more vulnerable version of Clothes Make the Superman (or at least My Suit Is Also Super ), since a super fedora is more likely to get blown off by a gust of wind than a super suit is. May also be a Hat of Authority . Super-Trope to Hat of Flight and Crown of Power , Sub-Trope to Magical Accessory . Compare Pull a Rabbit out of My Hat , Weaponized Headgear and Goggles Do Something Unusual .
